Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ContentSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ContentSettings
public class ContentSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for ContentSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ContentSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableCMSC2CConnections" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableChatterFileLink" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContentAutoAssign" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContentDistForPortalUsers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContentDistPwOptionsBit1" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContentDistPwOptionsBit2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContentDistribution" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContentSupportMultiLanguage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContentWorkspaceAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDeleteFileInContentPacks" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFileShareSetByRecord" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFilesUsrShareNetRestricted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableJPGPreviews" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLibraryManagedFiles" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableShowChatterFilesInContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSiteGuestUserToUploadFiles" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableUploadFilesOnAttachments" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="setValidContentTypeForAtchDocDownload" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="skipContentAssetTriggers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="skipContentAssetTriggersOnDeploy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
